plainEnglish: Each historical verifier exception now has a curation decision. This does not clear the exception; it tells the next cleanup pass what to do before the deadline.

decisions.reason: This historical done card still represents active Foundation trust, source, security, UX, or data behavior. Add ID-named verifier coverage before the exception deadline.
decisions.nextAction: Add direct verifier coverage or convert to a scoped cleanup card.
